name: Orion Health FHIR R4 API
description: The Orion Health API provides FHIR R4 (HL7 Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) compliant endpoints for accessing and managing clinical health data. It supports 33 FHIR resource types covering clinical data, care management, medications, patient demographics, and organizational information. The API enables interoperability across disparate healthcare systems by providing a standardized interface for patient records.
